task_completion.description: Create the three required layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD should display three custom layers: 'Board_Outline' (White/Black depending on canvas theme), 'Mounting_Holes' (Red), and 'Keepout_Zone' (Yellow).
A large outer rectangle (representing the 100x80 board perimeter) is visible on the drawing canvas in the 'Board_Outline' layer color.
A smaller yellow rectangle is visible inside the outer board outline rectangle, with an even margin on all sides (representing the 80x60 boundary from 10,10 to 90,70).

task_completion.description: Draw the four mounting hole circles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four small red circles are visible near the four corners of the drawing, positioned between the outer board outline and the inner keepout zone.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing as a DXF file in the correct location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar displays 'pcb_outline.dxf', or a file manager/terminal/save dialog confirms the file is saved in '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreCAD application open and being interacted with (mouse movements, tool selections, or LibreCAD command line usage).

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing the DXF file directly via text editor or script
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent using nano, vim, gedit, or python scripts in the terminal to generate the DXF file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually drew the shapes rather than just opening a pre-existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD command line history at the bottom of the screen shows drawing commands (e.g., 'rect', 'circle', coordinate inputs) being entered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a DXF file at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/pcb_outline.dxf'. The drawing must contain three specific layers: 1) 'Board_Outline' (Color: White/Index 7) containing a 100x80 rectangle from (0,0) to (100,80). 2) 'Mounting_Holes' (Color: Red/Index 1) containing 4 circles with a radius of 1.6mm at coordinates (5,5), (95,5), (5,75), and (95,75). 3) 'Keepout_Zone' (Color: Yellow/Index 2) containing an 80x60 rectangle from (10,10) to (90,70). Note that in CAD software, 'White' (Index 7) often renders as black on a white background or white on a black background.
